title: alchemilla arvensis var. microcarpa
intro: Alchemilla arvensis var. microcarpa, also known as the lesser lady's mantle, is a variety of the lady's mantle plant, which belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to Europe. The plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Alchemilla arvensis var. microcarpa include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive problems, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Alchemilla arvensis var. microcarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
